mnemonics: Never Leave The House Until You Find
keyPoints: Iterative Deepening: Start with a shallow search (d = 1) and gradually increase depth.
Depth First Search: Explore as far as possible along each branch before backtracking.
Maintain a priority queue to keep track of nodes to visit, with the lowest f-score at the top.
Update the depth and priority queue after each exploration to adapt to changing search space.
